subject: Compacts
Health Professions and Practices
Licenses and Licensure
bill.title: Requiring school districts to provide elementary students with a certain amount of daily recess, prohibiting limiting or withholding recess for disciplinary reasons, requiring a Kansas state fitness test and designating required recess time as part of the school term.

action.description: Motion to suspend Joint Rule 4 (k) to allow consideration adopted; —
